message.content:
You are fixing ESLint warnings for RECO-803 in this NestJS repo.

TASK: Fix 11 ESLint warnings in `src/modules/rest/frequently-bought-together/frequently-bought-together.service.ts`:
- Line 38: `custom-rules/require-object-params`
- Line 84: `@typescript-eslint/no-unnecessary-condition` — types have no overlap
- Lines 207, 219, 231: `custom-rules/require-object-params`
- Line 232: `@typescript-eslint/no-unnecessary-type-parameters` — Type parameter T used only once
- Lines 419-420: `@typescript-eslint/no-unnecessary-condition` — unnecessary `??` and optional chains

STEPS:
1. Create branch: `git checkout main && git checkout -b RECO-803-fix-eslint-fbt-service`
2. Read the file to understand all issues
3. For require-object-params: convert positional params to named object params, update ALL call sites
4. For no-unnecessary-condition: remove unnecessary `??` and `?.` and type overlaps
5. For no-unnecessary-type-parameters: remove the unused type parameter or replace with concrete type
6. Run `npx eslint src/modules/rest/frequently-bought-together/frequently-bought-together.service.ts` — verify 0 warnings
7. Run `npx tsc --noEmit --pretty` — verify types pass
8. Commit with --no-verify: "RECO-803: fix ESLint warnings in frequently-bought-together.service.ts"
9. Push with --no-verify
10. Create PR via `gh pr create`

Add Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com> to commit.
Use --no-verify for both commit and push.
Search ENTIRE codebase for call sites when changing function signatures.
NO COMMENTS in code per project rules.

content.text:
Now I have a clear picture. The response DTO has non-optional properties (`style_id`, `frequently_bought_together`, `fallback_used`), so `res?.` and `res?.frequently_bought_together?.length ?? 0` are unnecessary. Let me also check line 84 more carefully - the filter condition.

Line 84: `.filter((id): id is number => id !== null && id !== undefined)` - need to check what `primary_category_id` type is.

content.content: src/modules/db/styles/types/style.base.interface.ts:4:	primary_category_id: number | null;

content.text: So `primary_category_id` is `number | null`, meaning `!== undefined` is unnecessary since the type can never be `undefined`. Now let me apply all fixes.

content.text: ESLint passes with 0 warnings. There are TypeScript errors to fix - the `exactOptionalPropertyTypes` issue with `styleIds[0]` which can be `undefined`. The first TS error and the load-test one are pre-existing. Let me fix the two errors in our file.

The issue is `exactOptionalPropertyTypes` - with this flag, `styleId?: number` means `number | missing`, not `number | undefined`. But `styleIds[0]` is `number | undefined`. I need to change the param type to accept `undefined` explicitly.

input.command:
gh pr create --title "RECO-803: fix ESLint warnings in frequently-bought-together.service.ts" --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary
- Fixed 11 ESLint warnings in `frequently-bought-together.service.ts`
- Converted `getCurrentColorStyle`, `selectRandomStylesFromCategories`, `selectRandomStylesFromRootCategories`, and `selectRandomStylesFromCategoriesGeneric` from positional to named object parameters (`custom-rules/require-object-params`)
- Removed unnecessary type parameter `T` from `selectRandomStylesFromCategoriesGeneric`, replaced with `(typeof styles)[number]` (`@typescript-eslint/no-unnecessary-type-parameters`)
- Removed `!== undefined` from filter where type is `number | null` (no `undefined` overlap) (`@typescript-eslint/no-unnecessary-condition`)
- Removed unnecessary `?.` and `??` from `responseFormatter` where DTO properties are non-optional (`@typescript-eslint/no-unnecessary-condition`)

## Test plan
- [x] `npx eslint` on target file: 0 warnings
- [x] `npx tsc --noEmit`: no errors in target file
- [ ] CI passes

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
EOF
)" 2>&1

content.text:
All done. Here is the summary:

**Branch**: `RECO-803-fix-eslint-fbt-service`
**PR**: https://github.com/customink/recommendations-service/pull/550
**File**: `/Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/recommendations-service/src/modules/rest/frequently-bought-together/frequently-bought-together.service.ts`

**11 ESLint warnings fixed (0 remaining)**:

1. **`custom-rules/require-object-params`** (5 warnings) -- Converted `getCurrentColorStyle`, `selectRandomStylesFromCategories`, `selectRandomStylesFromRootCategories`, and `selectRandomStylesFromCategoriesGeneric` from positional parameters to named object destructured parameters. Updated all internal call sites accordingly.

2. **`@typescript-eslint/no-unnecessary-condition`** (1 warning, line 84) -- Removed `&& id !== undefined` from the filter on `primary_category_id` since the type is `number | null` (never `undefined`).

3. **`@typescript-eslint/no-unnecessary-type-parameters`** (1 warning, line 232) -- Removed type parameter `T` from `selectRandomStylesFromCategoriesGeneric`, replaced internal `Record<number, T[]>` with `Record<number, (typeof styles)[number][]>`.

4. **`@typescript-eslint/no-unnecessary-condition`** (4 warnings, lines 419-420) -- Removed unnecessary `?.` optional chains and `?? 0`/`?? false` fallbacks from `responseFormatter` since `FrequentlyBoughtTogetherV2ResponseDto` properties are all non-optional.

Also added `| undefined` to `getCurrentColorStyle`'s `styleId` parameter type to satisfy `exactOptionalPropertyTypes` when called with `styleIds[0]`.
